I'm Ratul Kalra

An independent digital marketing specialist with a passion for creating impactful strategies and helping companies grow through data-driven, people-centered solutions. For nearly a decade, I’ve been delivering innovative marketing campaigns that connect brands with the right audiences.

Collaborating with global brands, startups, and agencies, I specialize in SEO, content strategy, performance marketing, and automation campaigns — all designed to drive engagement, boost visibility, and deliver measurable results.

My work focuses on turning complex marketing challenges into clear, actionable strategies that fuel business growth and make a real difference.

Reviews

Working with Ratul has been a game-changer for our brand. They not only helped us improve our SEO and content strategy but also brought fresh ideas that elevated our entire digital presence. Clear communication, smart strategies, and real results — we couldn’t be happier.
⎯    Aditya Matai, Marketing Head at GETJOP INC.
I’ve collaborated with several marketers, but Ratul stands out. They have this rare mix of creativity and data-driven thinking that makes every campaign hit harder. From outreach to performance tracking, they made sure everything aligned perfectly with our goals. Highly recommend!
⎯    Frank Berry, Chief Creative Officer at Gomi
Working with Ratul was an absolute pleasure. Their attention to detail and creative flair truly set them apart. They took our vision and turned it into something beyond our expectations.
⎯    Michael Brown, Founder at Fabriks
Sharp, strategic, and always on point. Ratul helped us drive real traffic and conversions — no fluff, just results.
⎯    Sarah Johnson, Marketing Lead at Technlogia
Fast, creative, and reliable. Ratul knows how to make marketing strategies that actually work.
⎯    Nishant Ahlawat, Product Manager at Saffron Edge
